prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约9067→8816→11731→12607→12353，2023年起位次显著后移，近3年累计后移约3400名；2025年基准约12353名，较2024年略有回升但仍处于近年高位；本省理科/物理类计划2021年252人、2022年269人、2023年266人、2024年280人、2025年311人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划335人，较2025年扩招约7.7%，扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年第31名，近年排名稳定在29–32名区间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；抖音学校热度排名第16（高热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；声誉评价方面未见明显负面舆情事件，学校整体形象正面稳定；化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-、电气工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、应用经济学A-，共8个A-及以上学科，工科与管理学科实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；河南省2026年考生总数约120万（较2025年约90.7万大幅增加），物理类按历史比例估算约72万，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，属邻省高校，对河南考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在河南招生占比约6.6%（2025年），河南为该校重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+7.7%）、河南省考生总数大幅增加（约+32%）以及学校高声誉与热门专业吸引力，在2025年基准12353名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约13000名，区间12500–13500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 9067 → 8816 → 11731 → 12607 → 12353. Since 2023, rankings have significantly shifted backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3400 positions in the last three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 12353, slightly higher than 2024 but still at a recent high. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 252 in 2021, 269 in 2022, 266 in 2023, 280 in 2024, and 311 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 335, an expansion of about 7.7% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it ranks 31st, with recent rankings stable in the 29–32 range, belonging to the top domestic universities. On Douyin, the school's popularity ranking is 16th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. There are no significant negative public opinion events regarding reputation; the overall image is positive and stable. It has 8 A- or above disciplines: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, and Applied Economics A-, with balanced strength in engineering and management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended with high social application heat. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 907,000 in 2025), with the physics category estimated at about 720,000 based on historical proportions. The expanded examinee scale intensifies competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, a neighboring province, offering some regional appeal to Henan examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 6.6% (2025), making Henan an important source province for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of backward rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+7.7%), the significant increase in Henan examinees (+32%), and the high reputation and popularity of hot majors, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 12353. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13000, with a range of 12500–13500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology (including Software Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence (including Robotics Engineering, Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Microelectronics Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics/Statistics
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering/Intelligent Vehicle Engineering
- Communication Engineering/Information Security
- Materials Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Business Administration
- Finance/Economics
- Accounting
- Civil Engineering/Intelligent Construction.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12500–13500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is better than 12500, focus on targeting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is around 13000, prioritize Tier 2 majors like Intelligent Manufacturing, Communication Engineering, and Statistics. If the ranking is close to 13500, use Tier 3 majors such as Business Administration and Finance as safety options, while also considering majors with lower admission rankings like Civil Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1351 → 1415 → 1233 → 1802 → 1240, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, it dropped sharply to 1802, then rebounded notably to 1240 in 2025, with a baseline of about 1240 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 32 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 57, an increase of 185% compared to 2025, a very large expansion that will significantly push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable range of 29–32 in recent years; Douyin university popularity ranking 16th (high heat), overall image positive; no significant negative public opinion events; Business Administration rated A, Applied Economics rated A-, liberal arts discipline evaluations mainly focus on economics and management, humanities and social sciences disciplines not separately rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature is divided and wait-and-see; the estimated number of history category examinees in Henan Province in 2026 is about 480,000, a significant increase from 352,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Hunan University is located in neighboring Hunan Province, offering some regional appeal to Henan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 6.6% (2025), making Henan an important source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the 185% expansion of the 2026 plan, and the notable increase in the total number of Henan examinees, the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 1240; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2586, with a range of 2198–2974.
